since_last: 66% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.64%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.86% · BTC -2.87% · Gold -2.86% · Nasdaq100 +2.26%. 66% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.64%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.64%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +12.55%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +12.55%, INTC +10.59%, SMR +10.06%, KLAC +9.47%, MU +9.36%. Laggards: INOD -8.64%, SPCX -6.37%, IBM -5.00%, WDAY -3.31%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.37% at $179.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
